name: io.github.team-telnyx/telnyx-mcp
title: Telnyx
description: Telnyx remote MCP server for voice, messaging, networking, and AI API discovery/invocation.
instructions: Connect to https://api.telnyx.com/v2/mcp using streamable-http transport. Authenticate with `Authorization: Bearer <TELNYX_API_KEY>`. Start auth discovery at https://telnyx.com/auth.md, then follow the protected-resource metadata hinted by any 401 bearer challenge. For programmatic onboarding, use https://telnyx.com/.well-known/agent-access.json and https://telnyx.com/agent-signup.md. Always inspect the endpoint schema before mutating calls because invoke_api_endpoint is destructive-capable.

auth.description: Telnyx API key. Send as `Authorization: Bearer <TELNYX_API_KEY>`.
